svg.text: 55 minutes | Opening - Diverge - Converge - Closing | Three data sources, one template
Sprint Review data (facilitator prepares before retro: metrics, stats, dates)
Ice breaker data (collected together, facilitator fills on template during writing phase)
Individual reflections (participants write during solo phase: articles, stories, opinions)
Full theatrical to light accent — dial up or down based on your read of the room.
The theme is a lens, not a performance obligation.
